summary: DLR (Daily Labour Report) feature testing completed. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend UI fully functional with proper data-testid attributes.

minor.issue: Rate limiting (429) triggered during rapid automated testing - not a bug, expected behavior

critical_code_review_comments: DLRPanel.jsx is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
Backend DLR endpoints properly validate entries and calculate costs
Duplicate date check working correctly - returns 400 with clear error message
seed_data_creation: None - used existing project proj_12f23331b542 with work orders wo_31d466c8 and wo_1787c639
context_for_next_testing_agent: DLR feature fully tested. Backend APIs: POST/GET/DELETE for DLR entries, GET project summary. Frontend: DLRPanel component used in both SiteEngineerProject.jsx (toggle button on work order cards) and ProjectDetail.jsx (DLR tab in work order detail). All data-testid attributes present.

POST /api/projects/{project_id}/work-ord.details: Creates DLR with auto cost calculation (count × day_value × rate). Returns dlr_id, total_workers, total_day_units, total_cost

GET /api/projects/{project_id}/work-orde.details: Returns list of DLR entries for work order. Supports ?date= filter

DELETE /api/projects/{project_id}/work-o.details: Deletes DLR entry. Returns 404 for non-existent DLR

GET /api/projects/{project_id}/dlr/summa.details: Returns project-wide DLR summary with by_contractor breakdown

Duplicate date check.details: Returns 400 with message 'DLR already recorded for {date}. Delete the existing entry first.'

SiteEngineerProject DLR toggle.details: Daily Labour Report toggle button on each work order card expands DLR panel

DLR dialog form.details: Dialog opens with date input, labour type selector, count input, day type selector, rate input, add/remove row buttons, total display, notes field

DLR list view.details: Shows entries with date, workers count, cost, day units. Delete button available for authorized users

ProjectDetail DLR tab.details: DLR tab present in work order detail view alongside Scope/Stages/Additional tabs

DLR date filter.details: Date filter input present with clear button

auto_cost_calculation_verified.test_case: 5 skilled × 1.0 day × ₹800 + 3 semi_skilled × 0.5 day × ₹600 + 10 unskilled × 1.5 day × ₹400
